topTopic.name: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey shatters box-office records and dominates industry conversation
topTopic.why: The day's dominant conversation is The Odyssey, appearing in multiple independent headlines: box-office record vs Oppenheimer (Forbes), IMAX boss calls it transformational (Deadline), IMAX Q2 earnings ride the film to double-digit growth (Variety/Wrap), Imax CEO calls it transformational (Deadline), and a documentary about Nolan's film is set for theatrical release (Wrap).

story.title: Imax Boss Reacts as The Odyssey Shatters Box-Office Records
story.angle: The News International quotes IMAX CEO on The Odyssey breaking records.

slots.reason: gather: <2 independent sources and no own article
